name: gopeed-extension-akirabox
author: user
title: AkiraBox Downloader
description: Resolves AkiraBox file pages to direct download links. Supports akirabox.to and akirabox.com file URLs.

settings.name: cookie
settings.title: Session Cookie (optional)
settings.description: Paste your akirabox.to cookie here if you have a premium account (from browser DevTools → Application → Cookies)
